title: Diagnostic Field Record — per (field x value_chain) datapoint
description: Validates a single populated datapoint produced by the ingestion agent. One record conforms to exactly one field definition in $defs, selected by field_id.

D0.01.title: Value chain definition & boundary
D0.01.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D0.02.title: Key products & sub-segments
D0.02.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D0.03.title: Value chain node map
D0.03.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D0.04.title: Actor inventory by node
D0.04.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D0.05.title: Lead/anchor firms identified
D0.05.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required conditional

D0.06.title: Geographic concentration / clusters
D0.06.description: Domain D0 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.01.title: Annual production volume
D1.01.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

reporting_year_check.description: Enforced in cross_field_rules: reporting_year >= 2020 or low/estimated confidence.

D1.02.title: Production value (output value)
D1.02.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

reporting_year_check.description: Enforced in cross_field_rules: reporting_year >= 2020 or low/estimated confidence.

D1.03.title: Capacity utilization rate
D1.03.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.04.title: Number of operating firms / installed plants
D1.04.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.05.title: Direct employment in the chain
D1.05.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.06.title: Import value (the product category)
D1.06.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

reporting_year_check.description: Enforced in cross_field_rules: reporting_year >= 2020 or low/estimated confidence.

D1.07.title: Export value (the product category)
D1.07.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

reporting_year_check.description: Enforced in cross_field_rules: reporting_year >= 2020 or low/estimated confidence.

D1.08.title: Trade balance / import dependency ratio
D1.08.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.09.title: Domestic market size & demand outlook
D1.09.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D1.10.title: Price levels & volatility
D1.10.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required conditional

D1.11.title: Regional/global competitiveness benchmark
D1.11.description: Domain D1 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D2.01.title: Principal raw materials / inputs
D2.01.description: Domain D2 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D2.02.title: Local vs imported input share
D2.02.description: Domain D2 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D2.03.title: Domestic raw material availability / reserves
D2.03.description: Domain D2 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D2.04.title: Input supply security & risk
D2.04.description: Domain D2 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D2.05.title: Input cost as share of production cost
D2.05.description: Domain D2 | scope per_chain | required conditional

D3.01.title: Technology level / vintage of equipment
D3.01.description: Domain D3 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D3.02.title: Labour productivity
D3.02.description: Domain D3 | scope per_chain | required conditional

D3.03.title: Process / post-harvest / yield losses
D3.03.description: Domain D3 | scope per_chain | required conditional

D3.04.title: Local value addition share
D3.04.description: Domain D3 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D3.05.title: Technology adoption / R&D linkages
D3.05.description: Domain D3 | scope per_chain | required optional

D4.01.title: Energy access, reliability & cost
D4.01.description: Domain D4 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D4.02.title: Water access & adequacy
D4.02.description: Domain D4 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D4.03.title: Logistics & transport constraints
D4.03.description: Domain D4 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D4.04.title: Waste / effluent management & circularity
D4.04.description: Domain D4 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D5.01.title: Access to finance — verdict
D5.01.description: Domain D5 | scope per_chain | required mandatory

D5.04.description: Domain D5 | scope per_chain | required optional
